_provenance: Schema-derived fixture for /api/state shadow_divergence key extension. Derived from AC-M1F.4.4 (PA-M1F-14). Structure matches the specified Option A extension: top-level 'shadow_divergence' key added to existing /api/state response.
_scenario: Two symphonies with divergence data. SYM_ALPHA has post-trigger divergence. SYM_BETA has no history (null).

null_guard.comment: PA-M1F-new: null guard — never NaN% or 0.00% for symphonies with no shadow_history rows

query_constraint.comment: AC-M1F.4.4: shadow_history read is one lightweight GROUP BY per polling cycle
